column1: This spreadsheet contains all configuration data for the FWG Commercial Wraps system.
• VehicleCategories - Vehicle types with size factors and sqft ranges
• ProjectTypes - Full Wrap, Partial Wrap, Lettering definitions
• DesignScenarios - Customer artwork situations and design fee triggers
• PricingMatrix - Price ranges by Vehicle × Project combination
• DesignFees - Design fees by Vehicle × Design Scenario
• Materials - Material costs and markup (internal reference)
• Changes take effect immediately in the system
• Use TRUE/FALSE for boolean columns (active, enabled)
• Prices are in dollars (no $ symbol needed)
System: FWG Commercial Wraps Estimator + Dashboard
